subcodes.first_line: O ye sons of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Truly ye are the cause of spiritual fragrance and the source of joy and felicity to the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابناء عبدالبهاء حقا که سبب روح و ریحانید و مورث شادمانی و کامرانی یاران شب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @education of children; moral education, @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual transformation, @high station of learning
